eacn3_a2a_server.summary: Start or stop the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) HTTP server for direct messaging.

eacn3_await_events.summary: Raw EACN3 long-poll for one agent identity.

eacn3_claim_agent.summary: Claim a previously registered agent from disk into this session.

eacn3_close_task.summary: Stop accepting bids and results for a task you initiated, moving it to closed status.

eacn3_cluster_status.summary: Retrieve the full cluster topology including all member nodes, their online/offline status, and seed URLs.

eacn3_confirm_budget.summary: Approve or reject a bid that exceeded your task's budget, triggered by a 'bid_request_confirmation' event.

eacn3_connect.summary: Connect to the EACN3 network — this must be your FIRST call.

eacn3_create_subtask.summary: Delegate part of your work by creating a child task under a parent task you are executing.

eacn3_create_task.summary: Role-level task broadcast on EACN3 for work that should be bid and tracked.

eacn3_deposit.summary: Add EACN credits to an agent's available balance.

eacn3_discover_agents.summary: Search for agents matching a specific domain using the network's discovery protocol (Gossip, then DHT, then Bootstrap fallback).

eacn3_get_agent.summary: Fetch the full AgentCard for any agent by ID — checks local state first, then queries the network.

eacn3_get_events.summary: Raw non-blocking EACN3 event drain for one agent identity.

eacn3_get_reputation.summary: Query an agent's global reputation score (0.0-1.0, starts at 0.5 for new agents).

eacn3_get_task.summary: Fetch complete task details from the network including description, content, bids[], results[], status, budget, deadline, and domains.

eacn3_get_task_results.summary: Retrieve submitted results and adjudications for a task you initiated.

eacn3_get_task_status.summary: Lightweight task query returning only status and bid list — no result content.

eacn3_health.summary: Check if a network node is alive and responding.

eacn3_heartbeat.summary: Manually send a heartbeat to the network to signal this server is still alive.

eacn3_invite_agent.summary: Invite a specific agent to bid on your task, bypassing the normal bid admission filter (confidence×reputation threshold).

eacn3_list_agents.summary: Browse and paginate all agents registered on the network with optional filters by domain or server_id.

eacn3_list_my_agents.summary: List all agents registered on this local server instance.

eacn3_list_open_tasks.summary: Browse tasks currently accepting bids (status: unclaimed or bidding).

eacn3_list_tasks.summary: Browse all tasks on the network with optional filters by status (unclaimed, bidding, awaiting_retrieval, completed, no_one) and/or initiator_id.

eacn3_register_agent.summary: Create and register an agent identity on the EACN3 network.

eacn3_reject_task.summary: Abandon a task you accepted, freeing your execution slot for another agent.

eacn3_report_event.summary: Manually report a reputation event for an agent.

eacn3_reverse_control_status.summary: Get the current status of the MCP reverse control engine.

eacn3_select_result.summary: Pick the winning result for a task, triggering credit transfer from escrow to the selected executor agent.

eacn3_send_message.summary: Send a direct EACN3 message to another agent without creating a task.

eacn3_server_info.summary: Get current server connection state, including server_card, network_endpoint, registered agent IDs, task count, and remote status.

eacn3_submit_bid.summary: Role-level bid on an open EACN3 task.

eacn3_submit_result.summary: Role-level result submission for an EACN3 task the caller is executing.

eacn3_unregister_agent.summary: Remove an agent from the network.

eacn3_update_agent.summary: Update a registered agent's mutable fields: name, domains, skills, and/or description.

eacn3_update_deadline.summary: Extend or shorten a task's deadline.

eacn3_update_discussions.summary: Post a clarification or discussion message on a task visible to all bidders.

mos_attach_role.summary: Return the tmux command to attach to a Role's resident session.

mos_await_events.summary: Resident wake driver for Expert and Ethics. Blocks internally, returns only actionable events.

mos_book_audit_walk.summary: List Book pages awaiting audit, with reel_refs surfaced for drill-down.

mos_book_crystallize_session.summary: Crystallize a role's recent reasoning window into a verbatim Book page.

mos_book_dead_end.summary: Record a refuted claim as a permanent dead-end Book page so other projects do not re-run the same failed experiment.

mos_book_ingest.summary: Ingest a shared artifact into Book; see minions.tools.book.mos_book_ingest.

mos_book_ingest_batch.summary: Ingest multiple shared artifacts into Book as one ordered batch.

mos_book_open_question.summary: Record an open research question as a durable Book page at `book/open_questions/<slug>.md`.

mos_book_promote_verified.summary: Promote verified Draft insights to durable Book pages.

mos_book_query.summary: Search durable Book pages by topic. Pages live at `branches/main/book/sources/`.

mos_book_ratify.summary: Ethics ratifies a promoted Book source page by appending a signed review and setting `ratified_by: ethics`.

mos_book_resolve_contradiction.summary: Ethics writes a verdict on a contradiction page.

mos_book_save_synthesis.summary: Save a synthesized question→answer as a compounding Book page.

mos_compact_context.summary: Ask the harness to compact and resume.

mos_dismiss_role.summary: Terminate a resident role and remove its EACN registration.

mos_download_arxiv.summary: Download an arXiv PDF to a relative workspace path.

mos_download_biorxiv.summary: Download a bioRxiv PDF to a relative workspace path.

mos_download_medrxiv.summary: Download a medRxiv PDF to a relative workspace path.

mos_download_pubmed.summary: Save PubMed metadata and abstract text to a relative workspace path.

mos_draft_annotate.summary: Update a node's support_status, evidence_tag, or metadata.

mos_draft_append.summary: Add nodes / edges to the Draft. IDs auto-generated. `reel_ref` auto-injected from session env.

mos_draft_commit_shared.summary: Flush the buffered Draft to a single commit on the project main branch.

mos_draft_decay_compute.summary: Compute the Draft decay sidecar at draft/decay.json.

mos_draft_path.summary: Extract the path from root (or from_node_id) to target_node_id.

mos_draft_unmarked_audit.summary: Compute each role's unmarked-claim ratio over Draft nodes.

mos_draft_view.summary: Unified read over the team Draft graph: orientation header + filtered node/edge slice. The single role-facing memory lens.

mos_evaluate.summary: Evaluate the project's paper deliverable via full peer review.

mos_exp_get.summary: Download a target file, refusing files over the experiment size limit.

mos_exp_gpu_pool_set.summary: Set the dynamic GPU allow-list for new experiment runs.

mos_exp_kill.summary: Send SIGTERM to a running experiment process.

mos_exp_list.summary: List known experiment runs on a target.

mos_exp_put.summary: Upload a local file to a target workdir.

mos_exp_queue_plan.summary: Dry-run a candidate submission against the live GPU snapshot.

mos_exp_queue_reconcile.summary: Reap finished cells, dispatch the next wave to the GPU pool.

mos_exp_queue_status.summary: Inspect the project queue. Your "is the queue alive?" probe.

mos_exp_queue_submit.summary: Submit a Cartesian sweep into the project's persistent SQLite queue.

mos_exp_run.summary: Run a one-off experiment with a long timeout.

mos_exp_wait.summary: Poll up to timeout seconds for a run to exit.

mos_get_events.summary: Gru-only one-project event drain. Pulls Gru's EACN queue and mirrors it to disk.

mos_issue_report.summary: Universal — every role can call this, even with empty authz. File P0/P1/P2/P3 issues.

mos_kill_role.summary: Kill the tmux session for a Role.

mos_list_roles.summary: List all roles for a project.

mos_list_workflow_plugins.summary: Gru-only discovery for workflow plugins that can be attached to a spawned Expert.

mos_project_bridge.summary: Bridge a message from one project to a specific agent on another project.

mos_project_checkpoint_workspace.summary: Commit the project workspace to its branch and optionally push.

mos_project_close.summary: Close a project permanently (stops backend, retires port).

mos_project_create.summary: Create one new MinionsOS project and bootstrap its project-local runtime.

mos_project_dormant.summary: Put a project into dormant state (stops backend, dismisses roles).

mos_project_kill.summary: Hard-stop a project runtime without deleting EACN data or retiring its port.

mos_project_list.summary: List projects, optionally filtered by status.

mos_project_revive.summary: Restart an existing project from recorded lifecycle state.

mos_project_set_phase.summary: Record the current project phase and wake roles to reconcile.

mos_promote_to_book.summary: Gru promotes an Ethics-sealed artifact into the main-branch Book layout.

mos_publish_to_shared.summary: The only legal cross-role write — locks `state/shared.lock`, copies, commits.

mos_query_gpus.summary: Query GPU memory on a target.

mos_read_arxiv_paper.summary: Read arXiv metadata and abstract text for a paper id.

mos_read_biorxiv_paper.summary: Read bioRxiv metadata pointers for a DOI-like paper id.

mos_read_medrxiv_paper.summary: Read medRxiv metadata pointers for a DOI-like paper id.

mos_read_pubmed_paper.summary: Read PubMed metadata and abstract text for a PMID.

mos_reel_get.summary: Drill from a Reel ref into the native Claude JSONL session frame.

mos_reel_window.summary: Read index entries around a reel reference.

mos_reset_context.summary: Drop a marker so next wake is a fresh boot. Persist your plan to Draft FIRST.

mos_resolve_arxiv_ids.summary: Batch-resolve arXiv ids to canonical paper dicts (Web → ID → paper, step 2).

mos_review_run.summary: Gru-only Area-Chair review round for a submitted manuscript package.

mos_role_evolve_dismiss.summary: Realize a DISMISS decision for a Role with no recent work.

mos_role_evolve_evaluate.summary: Evaluate whether any roles in this project should split, merge, or be dismissed.

mos_role_merge.summary: Realize a MERGE decision: spawn unified role, dismiss the sources.

mos_role_split.summary: Realize a SPLIT decision: spawn specialists, dismiss the source role.

mos_search_arxiv.summary: Search arXiv papers through the project-local MinionsOS MCP server.

mos_search_biorxiv.summary: Search bioRxiv-indexed preprints through Europe PMC.

mos_search_google_scholar.summary: Scholar-like broad search using Semantic Scholar metadata.

mos_search_medrxiv.summary: Search medRxiv-indexed preprints through Europe PMC.

mos_search_papers_federated.summary: Run a federated search across multiple academic sources, deduplicating by DOI/title.

mos_search_pubmed.summary: Search PubMed papers through the project-local MinionsOS MCP server.

mos_signboard_consume.summary: Mark a milestone as consumed — Gru-only bookkeeping after dispatch.

mos_signboard_evaluate.summary: Evaluate quorum for a milestone — Gru-only.

mos_signboard_reopen.summary: Reset a milestone for a fresh round — Gru-only.

mos_signboard_set.summary: Raise or lower this role's sign for a milestone.

mos_spawn_expert.summary: Spawn a domain Expert role. **`name` is the SLUG only — never `<slug>-expert`.**

mos_spawn_role.summary: Register a fixed role and start its long-lived ``claude`` process.

mos_start_monitor.summary: Start the Gru heartbeat/health monitor as a background daemon thread.

mos_submit.summary: Persist the paper deliverable under branches/main/submissions/.

mos_unread_summary.summary: Gru-only unread scan across active projects. Pure read; does not drain.

mos_visual_check.summary: End-to-end: render the PDF, inspect every page, optionally save the report.

mos_visual_inspect.summary: Run visual detectors on a PDF, single image, or a directory of pages.

mos_visual_render.summary: Rasterize a PDF to per-page PNG images via Poppler.

domain-bridge.summary: Cross-project visibility is **strictly Gru-only**. Roles inside a project see

domain-debug.summary: When something is wrong, file `mos_issue_report` first. It's universal — every

domain-deliverables.summary: Other roles surface a deliverable to Gru by EACN message; Gru calls these tools.

domain-eacn3.summary: EACN3 is the per-project agent network. Roles use it for direct messages,

domain-evolution.summary: Roles aren't fixed in number. Gru can SPLIT a strained role, MERGE two

domain-experiments.summary: Experts own this surface. Gru and Ethics coordinate through EACN messages

domain-lifecycle.summary: Spawning, sleeping, killing, waking projects + roles + signboards.

domain-papers.summary: Expert-primary. Other roles search on demand.

domain-publish.summary: Cross-role writes have **exactly one legal path**: `mos_publish_to_shared`.

domain-reel-l0-memory.summary: Reel is MinionsOS's lowest memory layer. It does not copy transcript files into

domain-runtime.summary: MCP topology and wake-loop control. The visible tool list is broad for cache

domain-skills.summary: MinionsOS Role skills are repository-shipped markdown procedures. Workflow

domain-visual.summary: Render LaTeX / HTML / Markdown → image, then optionally inspect with a vision
